description_long: This object appears to be a highly abstracted or stylized representation of a pedestrian adult, with extremely elongated and narrow limbs and body. The form is composed of several thin, linear elements that converge at a lower point, suggesting legs, while two additional lines extend upward, possibly representing arms. The overall silhouette is very minimalistic, lacking any discernible facial or anatomical details. The structure is visually striking due to its exaggerated proportions and sharp, angular lines. The surface appears smooth and uniform, with a dark, possibly metallic or plastic finish. There are no visible accessories, clothing details, or carried objects.
description: A highly abstract, elongated, and minimalistic representation of a pedestrian adult, composed of thin, linear elements with a smooth dark finish.
description_view_0: Tall, thin, and sharply angled lines dominate the view, with two main vertical elements and a third diverging at the base.
description_view_1: The object appears as a set of overlapping, narrow lines, emphasizing the extreme thinness and lack of detail.
description_view_2: Only a portion of the elongated structure is visible, highlighting the linear and abstract nature of the form.
description_view_3: Multiple thin lines are visible, diverging from a lower point, reinforcing the stylized and minimalistic design.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted form with no discernible clothing
